headline: Tesla’s Terafab AI Chip Push Meets Easing Autonomy Regulatory Pressure
summary: Intel has joined Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA), SpaceX, and xAI in a new Terafab AI chip manufacturing initiative focused on domestic production for advanced computing. The Terafab facility is intended to support AI, robotics, and autonomous vehicle workloads across the partnered companies. The US National Highway Traffic Safety Administration has closed its probe into Tesla’s "Actually Smart Summon" feature, allowing continued deployment of the capability.
